title: Vayalur Murugan Temple
tagline: Vayalur Murugan Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Vayalur Murugan Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Muruga, son of Lord Shiva and Parvati, located in the village of Kumaravayalur in Tiruchirapalli district, Tamil Nadu, Ind
overview.description: The Vayalur Murugan Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Muruga, son of Lord Shiva and Parvati, located in the village of Kumaravayalur in Tiruchirapalli district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is believed to have been initiated during the period of Medieval Cholas during the 9th century. The temple is maintained and administered by the Hindu Religious and Charitable Endowments Department of the Government of Tamil Nadu. Though the presiding deity is Shiva, the temple is known for the Murugan shrine.

topPlaces.name: Kumaravayalur
topPlaces.description: Kumaravayalur is a village in Tiruchirappalli district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The village is situated 9 kilometers from the heart of Tiruchirappalli city and is home to the Subramanya Swamy temple.

topPlaces.name: Perungudi, Tiruchirappalli
topPlaces.description: Perungudi is a village in Andanallur Taluk in the Tiruchirappalli District of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. A part of Malliyampathu Panchayath, it is located 7 kilometers west of district headquarters and 9 kilometers from Andanallur.

topPlaces.name: Somarasampettai
topPlaces.description: Somarasampettai is a part of the city of Tiruchirappalli and located in the Srirangam taluk of Tiruchirappalli district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Adavathur West
topPlaces.description: Adavathur West is a village in Srirangam taluk of Tiruchirappalli district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Adavathur East
topPlaces.description: Adavathur East is a part of the city of Tiruchirappalli and located in the Srirangam taluk of Tiruchirappalli district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Kulumani
topPlaces.description: Kulumani is a village in the Srirangam taluk of Tiruchirappalli district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Uyyakondan Thirumalai Temple
topPlaces.description: Uyyakondan Thirumalai Temple (also called Ujeevanathar temple, Karkudimalai or Thirumalainallur)) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located on the banks of Uyyakondan river, Trichy, in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Uyyakondan, and is represented by the lingam.

topPlaces.name: Pirattiyur
topPlaces.description: Pirattiyur is a part of the city of Tiruchirappalli and located in Tiruchirappalli West taluk, Tiruchirappalli district, Tamil Nadu, India. A former Town Panchayat, which covers the whole of Edamalaipatti Pudur, it was merged with the Tiruchirappalli Corporation in 1994.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vayalur Murugan Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vayalur Murugan Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vayalur Murugan Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (12 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (8 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vayalur Murugan Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vayalur Murugan Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vayalur Murugan Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vayalur Murugan Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vayalur Murugan Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kumaravayalur, Perungudi, Tiruchirappalli, Somarasampettai, Adavathur West, Adavathur East.
